title: Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates!
